    initFireball(Entity, Player) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Initializes a fireball as an ItemDisplay entity, spawns it in the player's world with the appropriate location and orientation, and sets its item stack to a fireball.
    initialize(Location) - Method in interface xyz.yaszu.freedom.Entities.BaseEntity
    Spawns and initializes this custom entity at the given location.
    initializeAmmo(Player, ItemStack, int) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.BulletSystem
    Initializes the ammo system for a player's weapon If the weapon doesn't have a weapon_id, it will use the base ammo pool
    initializeAmmoPersistent(Player, ItemStack, int) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.BulletSystem
    Initializes the ammo system with a persistent weapon ID This allocates a unique ID for the weapon and gives it its own ammo pool

    InventoryPersistentDataType - Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    A stateless PersistentDataType for storing and retrieving Inventory objects.
    InventoryPersistentDataType.LoadResult - Record Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    The deserialized inventory together with any metadata embedded at save time.
    InventoryPersistentDataType.SaveContext - Record Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    Metadata to embed when saving an inventory.
